bias.analyst: Twenty-five minutes to the bell. After yesterday's big trend day, price opens almost exactly on the central magnet of today's freshly drawn map - the most neutral possible start. The tape's early markers: a meaningful ceiling forming right where the map's first resistance sits, and the first real bid cluster a few points below. Two scripts today: digestion (most likely after a day like yesterday) or a second trend leg - and only real volume can authorize the latter. The first half hour is the referee; Theo holds all judgment until it speaks.
bias.commentator: MATCHDAY TWO of the public era, folks! After yesterday's two-nil masterclass, the teams line up dead center of a brand-new pitch. Early scouting: the away side is already building a wall exactly where the map says they should, and our supporters have planted their first flag a few rows below. Quiet calendar, big week ahead. Kickoff in twenty-five - the first half hour names the game!
